name: PER_PREVIOUS_JOB_USAGES
description: This table holds information about which previous jobs are relevant to a particular employee assignment. This can be important information when calculating entitlements (collective agreement) such as grade or probation period.

columns.Name: PREVIOUS_JOB_USAGE_ID
columns.Comments: Surrogate Id for a Previous employer record.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: This is the FK of the assignment to which previous job usage record applies.

columns.Name: PREVIOUS_JOB_ID
columns.Comments: This is the FK of the previous job to which previous job usage record applies.

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: Start date of the job.

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: End date of the job.

columns.Name: PERIOD_YEARS
columns.Comments: The whole number of years at the previous job.

columns.Name: PERIOD_DAYS
columns.Comments: The number of days on top of the whole year at the previous employer.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: PREVIOUS_EMPLOYER_ID
columns.Comments: This is the FK of the Previous Employer to which previous job usage record applies.

columns.Name: PERIOD_MONTHS
columns.Comments: The whole number of months at the previous job.
